overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi horror game showing a character exploring a dimly lit industrial storage room. The character interacts with a holographic wrist device, examines a bloody corpse, and exits into a neon-lit corridor. The environment features metal shelving, orange industrial racking, and futuristic UI elements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cramped, dimly lit industrial storage room into a sterile, neon-lit futuristic corridor. It begins as the character enters a supply closet, pausing among boxes and metal shelving to navigate a holographic wrist interface. As the character moves deeper into the storage area, the scene shifts through narrow aisles of bright orange industrial racking toward a blood-stained metal table and scattered medical supplies. The camera then follows the character into a dark corner to closely examine a bloody corpse lying on the floor before turning away from the grim discovery. Finally, the character exits the room, transitioning from the industrial gloom into a corridor defined by teal neon light strips and a sequence of numbered metal doors.
